title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Embassy Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Embassy Group Digital Technologies:
Embassy Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group Digital Technologies!
